title: AIIMS Rishikesh Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 03 Program Manager and Other Posts
description: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Rishikesh (AIIMS Rishikesh) has declared the official notification for 2026. To fill up the vacancies for 03 Program Manager and Field Investigator Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified for B.Sc, M.Sc, B.Sc Nursing, BDS, BHMS, BAMS, M.Sc, M.Sc Nursing, GNM can grab this chance and apply for the AIIMS Rishikesh Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salarystructure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply ...
